rationale: Alt labeler rolled the Toronto footnote (CAD 4,200,000) into total_tiv at a 1:1 FX assumption, producing 96.6M vs. the primary label's 92.4M USD-only total. Both are defensible readings of the source document; the primary treats the Toronto row as scope-excluded. This is intentional — eval frameworks should be able to express label uncertainty rather than treating one labeling as absolute truth.
notes: Only the differing field is included here. Defer to ground_truth/ for any field not listed under disagrees_with_primary_on.
